message:
fix(analytics): correct script reference in GA4 diagnostic recommendations

The recommendations section referenced `configure-ga4.ts` which doesn't
exist. Fixed to reference the correct script `fix-ga4-settings.ts`.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+     1. Run: bun run scripts/fix-ga4-settings.ts (adds missing dimensions)
      2. Verify Google Signals is enabled in GA4 Admin UI
      3. Wait 24-48 hours for data to accumulate
      4. Re-run this diagnostic to verify improvements
